summary: Phase 2 testing complete: AI Sandbox with Real Claude Sonnet AI working, AI Auto-Reply in conversations working. 8/8 backend tests pass, all frontend features verified. Portuguese (PT) language properly displayed throughout UI.

ui_bugs.issue: Made with Emergent badge overlays the send button, preventing click. Workaround: Press Enter to send

context_for_next_testing_agent: All Phase 2 AI features working. Sandbox API returns debug info with response_time_ms, tokens, language, model. AI Reply adds agent messages to conversations. CRM shows 8 leads with $27,200 pipeline value. Dashboard shows 10 messages today.

backend_apis: POST /api/sandbox/chat - sends message, gets AI response (200) - tested with Portuguese
POST /api/conversations/{id}/ai-reply - returns 400 when no customer message
frontend_pages: Agent Sandbox (/agents/sandbox) - page loads with Portuguese UI
Sandbox - type message in input field and send with Enter key
Sandbox - AI response displayed with agent name 'Carol'
Sandbox - Debug panel shows: response_time_ms (2147ms), tokens (29), language (PT), model (claude-sonnet-4-5)
Sandbox - Config panel opens with settings button
Sandbox - Config: Agent name input works
Sandbox - Config: Agent type dropdown works (sales/support/scheduling/sac/onboarding)
Sandbox - Config: System prompt textarea visible
Chat Inbox (/chat) - shows 9 conversations with channel filters (Todos/WhatsApp/Instagram/Facebook/Telegram)
Chat Detail - shows message history (customer/operator/agent messages)
Chat Detail - AI Reply button (sparkle icon) visible and clickable
Chat Detail - AI Reply triggers Claude Sonnet and adds agent message to conversation
CRM - shows 8 leads with $27,200 total pipeline value
CRM - leads display name, phone, email, value, score
Dashboard (/dashboard) - shows stats: 10 Mensagens Hoje, 0% Taxa de Resolucao, 10/50 messages used
Dashboard - shows in Portuguese with 'Bem-vindo de volta' greeting
All pages - Portuguese (PT) language properly displayed after onboarding selection

ai_integration_notes.model: Claude Sonnet 4.5 via Emergent LLM Key
ai_integration_notes.language_detection: Responds in same language as user input
